conj.statement: Across all tiers, policy must honor the *non-identical* — the element of experience that escapes categorization (Adorno: “the non-identical is the criterion of the identity of the concept”). 2. **Institutional Self-Undermining as Virtue**: No institution should aim for coherence or effectiveness — its value lies in *exposing its own complicity*.
contradicting_evidence: It must institutionalize *negative capability*: the capacity to dwell in unresolved tension without resorting to false consensus or administrative resolution.

Institutional Self-Critique**: All agencies must submit *self-undermining reports* annually — e.g., “This agency’s work in Year X reproduced the domination it sought to critique in the following ways…”
Evidence*: National framework has “no implementation timeline”; State archives treat history as *open wound*; County TMPs use “unscripted encounters” without outcomes.
conj.subtopic: Negative Dialectics and the Refusal of Reconciliation as Method
